extract: Fire Blast (Japanese: だいもんじ Daimonji) is a damage-dealing Fire-type move introduced in Generation I. It is: TM38 from Generation I to Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon, and in Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl. TM46 in Pokémon: Let's Go, Pikachu! and Let's Go, Eevee!. TR15 in Pokémon Sword and Shield. TM141 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet. TM038 in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.
